tutorials.description: Learn how to store and manage data in your programs using variables. Master different data types, naming conventions, and scope rules.
Discover how to make decisions in your code with if-else statements, switch cases, and logical operators to control program flow.
Explore repetitive execution with for loops, while loops, and do-while loops. Learn to iterate through data efficiently and avoid common pitfalls.
Master code organization and reusability by creating functions. Understand parameters, return values, and function scope to write modular programs.
Dive into object-oriented programming with classes. Learn about constructors, properties, methods, and how to create blueprints for objects.
